name: report_control_sets
short_description: Report the unique control sets in design
full_help:
report_control_sets

Description: 
Report the unique control sets in design

Syntax: 
report_control_sets  [-file <arg>] [-append] [-hierarchical]
                     [-hierarchical_depth <arg>] [-sort_by <args>]
                     [-cells <args>] [-return_string] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
Report

Usage: 
  Name                   Description
  ----------------------------------
  [-file]                Filename to output results to. (send output to 
                         console if -file is not used)
  [-append]              Append to existing file
  [-hierarchical]        Generates text-based hierarchical report.
  [-hierarchical_depth]  Specifies the depth level for textual hierarchical 
                         report
                         Default: 0
  [-sort_by]             Sort criterion: can be used only when -verbose is 
                         used. Options are clk, clkEn, set. Ex: 
                         report_control_sets -verbose -sort_by {clk clkEn}
  [-cells]               Cells/bel_instances for which to report control sets
  [-return_string]       Return report as string
  [-quiet]               Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]             Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report
